Terms of Service

Last updated: March 2026

1. Acceptance of terms

By using tipright.app, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you don't agree, please don't use the site. We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site means you accept the updated terms.

2. What tipright.app is

tipright.app provides free tip calculators for personal services in the United States and other countries with tipping culture. All calculators are informational tools only. Results are estimates based on common tipping conventions and are not financial, legal, or tax advice.

3. No warranties

tipright.app is provided "as is" without any warranties, express or implied. We don't guarantee that the site will be available at all times, error-free, or that the tip amounts shown are right for your specific situation. Tipping norms vary by location, establishment, and circumstance.

The No Tax on Tips calculator provides estimates only. Tax laws change. Always consult a qualified tax professional for advice specific to your situation.

4. Limitation of liability

tipright.app and its operators are not liable for any damages arising from your use of this site, including but not limited to decisions made based on tip calculations, tax estimates, or tipping etiquette guidance provided here.

5. Intellectual property

The content, design, and code of tipright.app are owned by tipright.app. You may not copy, reproduce, or redistribute any part of this site without permission. Calculators are free to use for personal, non-commercial purposes.

6. Third-party services

tipright.app uses third-party services including Cloudflare (hosting and CDN) and Google AdSense (advertising). These services have their own terms of service and privacy policies. We are not responsible for the practices of these third parties.

7. External links

tipright.app may link to external websites. We are not responsible for the content, accuracy, or practices of any linked sites.

8. Governing law

These terms are governed by the laws of the United States. Any disputes arising from use of tipright.app will be subject to the jurisdiction of US courts.

9. Contact

Questions about these terms? Visit our contact page.

© 2026 tipright.app — Free tip calculators for every service
